message:
refactor(compaction): extract serialization helpers, binary-search cut point, push-based file list formatting

Decompose the monolithic `serialize_conversation` function into focused
single-responsibility helpers: `append_user_message`, `append_custom_message`,
`append_assistant_thinking`, `append_assistant_text`, and `append_tool_calls`.
Each operates on a mutable `String` buffer directly instead of allocating
intermediate `Vec<String>` collections, eliminating temporary allocations
throughout the serialization hot path.

Replace the linear reverse-scan in `find_cut_point` with
`partition_point` (binary search) to find the largest cut point <= i,
reducing O(n) to O(log n) for conversations with many valid cut points.

Rewrite `format_file_operations` and extract `write_escaped_file_list`
to build the XML-tagged file list output via direct `push`/`push_str`
calls instead of `format!` + `join`, reducing allocations.

Update companion tests in tests/compaction.rs:
- Fix `text_of_tokens` to use `saturating_mul(3)` matching the actual
  CHARS_PER_TOKEN_ESTIMATE constant (was incorrectly using 4)
- Insert explicit tool_result entries between assistant tool calls and
  subsequent user messages to match the stricter parent-chain validation
- Adjust keep-token thresholds in round-trip and second-pass tests to
  account for corrected token estimation
- Update turn_prefix assertion count to include new tool_result entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
